playArea.value: A highly configurable three-part experimental setup includes a particle source emitter, double-slit barrier, and detector screen. When experiment is running, particles pass through available slits in barrier to land on detector screen and build patterns. You can choose and adjust source particles, configure slits in barrier, observe and take snapshots of resulting patterns on detector screen.

controlArea.value: Measurement tools can be added or removed to assist with data collection and analysis. Reset sim to start over.

maxHitsReachedHint.value: Clear detector screen to make more observations.

currentDetails.value:
Currently, { $isPlaying ->
  [false] sim is paused. { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] Source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] Source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] Source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
 *[true] { $isMaxHitsReached ->
    [true] source is off. Max number of { $sourceType ->
      [photons] photon
      [electrons] electron
      [neutrons] neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
    } hits reached. Detector screen shows hits pattern.
   *[false] { $isEmitting ->
      [true] source emits { $sourceType ->
        [photons] photons
        [electrons] electrons
        [neutrons] neutrons
      *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
      } directly at double-slit barrier with { $slitSetting ->
        [bothOpen] both slits open
        [leftCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] top slit covered
         *[leftRight] left slit covered
        }
        [rightCovered] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] bottom slit covered
         *[leftRight] right slit covered
        }
        [leftDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on top slit
         *[leftRight] detector on left slit
        }
        [rightDetector] { $slitOrientation ->
          [topBottom] detector on bottom slit
         *[leftRight] detector on right slit
        }
        [noBarrier] no barrier
       *[bothDetectors] detectors on both slits
      }. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] { $hasHits ->
          [true] Detector screen shows intensity pattern.
         *[false] Detector screen is empty.
        }
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen has no hits.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
     *[false] source is off. { $detectionMode ->
        [averageIntensity] Detector screen is empty.
       *[hits] { $hasHits ->
          [false] Detector screen is empty.
         *[true] Detector screen shows hits pattern.
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

interactionHint.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Adjust source or slits and watch for changes on detector screen.
 *[false] Turn on { $sourceType ->
    [photons] photon
    [electrons] electron
    [neutrons] neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] helium atom
  } source and observe detector screen.
}

overview.value:
Currently, { $isPlaying ->
  [false] sim is paused.
 *[true] sim is running.
} { $sourceType ->
  [photons] photons
  [electrons] electrons
  [neutrons] neutrons
 *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
} { $isEmitting ->
  [true] are being emitted
 *[false] are not being emitted
}. { $displayMode ->
  [graph] The graph is shown
 *[screen] The detector screen is shown
} in { $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Average Intensity mode.
 *[hits] Hits mode.
}

sourceStatus.value:
Source is { $isEmitting ->
  [true] on
 *[false] off
}. Time is { $isPlaying ->
  [true] running
 *[false] paused
} at { $timeSpeed } speed.

sourceBeam.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [false] No beam is visible in the wave area.
 *[true] { $sourceType ->
    [photons] { $photonColor ->
      [violet] Violet
      [blue] Blue
      [indigo] Indigo
      [green] Green
      [yellow] Yellow
      [orange] Orange
     *[red] Red
    } and black plane waves emanate from left.
   *[electrons] Gray and black plane waves emanate from left.
    [neutrons] Gray and black plane waves emanate from left.
    [heliumAtoms] Gray and black plane waves emanate from left.
  } { $wavefrontSpacing ->
    [tightlyPacked] Wave peaks closely spaced.
    [widelySpaced] Wave peaks somewhat far apart.
   *[moderatelySpaced] Wave peaks moderately spaced.
  }
}

photonDetail.value: Photon wavelength is { $wavelength } nanometers, in the { $color } zone.

particleDetail.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [electrons] Electron
  [neutrons] Neutron
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
} speed is { $speed } meters per second. Effective matter wavelength is about { $wavelength } picometers.

slits.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] Both slits are open. Slit separation is { $separation }.
  [leftCovered] Top slit is covered. One open slit creates a broad diffraction pattern.
  [rightCovered] Bottom slit is covered. One open slit creates a broad diffraction pattern.
  [leftDetector] Top slit has a detector that can identify which path particles take.
  [rightDetector] Bottom slit has a detector that can identify which path particles take.
  [noBarrier] No barrier is between source and detector screen.
 *[bothDetectors] Both slits have detectors that can identify which path particles take.
}

detectorPattern.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [false] Source is off, so there is no pattern on the detector.
 *[true] { $detectionMode ->
    [averageIntensity] { $patternFormation ->
      [empty] No pattern has reached the detector screen yet.
      [forming] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Pattern forming on detector screen.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Broad diffraction pattern on detector screen.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Which-path detector pattern on detector screen.
       *[noBarrier] Direct detector pattern on detector screen.
      }
      [complete] { $patternKind ->
        [doubleSlitInterference] Detector screen stable, { $bandCount } { $bandSpacing ->
          [farApart] far-apart
          [closelySpaced] closely spaced
        *[mediumSpaced] medium-spaced
        } equidistant bright spots form pattern, brightest at center.
        [singleSlitDiffraction] Diffraction pattern forming on detector screen, brightest at
        center and fading further from the center.
        [whichPathDiffraction] Which-path detector pattern forming on detector screen, broad
        like a single-slit pattern.
       *[noBarrier] Direct detector pattern forming on detector screen, brightest along the straight path
        from source to detector screen.
      }
      [paused] Detector pattern formation is paused.
      [notApplicable] Detector pattern does not apply to the current setup.
     *[collectingHits] Detector pattern is collecting hits.
    }
   *[hits] { $hitStage ->
      [none] Hits are starting to accumulate on the detector screen.
      [few] Hits pattern is just beginning with a few scattered hits. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [emerging] Hits pattern is showing faint repeated stripes. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
      [developing] Hits pattern is developing distinct interference bands. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
     *[clear] Hits pattern is showing a clear interference pattern. Total hits: { $hitCount }.
    }
  }
}

waveProgress.value:
{ $waveProgressStage ->
  [sourceOff] Source is off, so no wave is traveling.
  [travelingToSlits] { $waveProgressCheckpoint ->
    [quarter] Wave approaching slits
    [half] Wave approaching slits
    [threeQuarters] Wave approaching slits
    [full] Wave approaching slits
   *[none] Wave approaching slits
  } { $waveSpeed ->
    [slow] at slow speed.
    [fast] at fast speed.
   *[medium] at medium speed.
  }
  [atSlits] Wave passing through slits, emerging as circular waves.
  [interferingAfterSlits] Circular waves overlap, creating checkered interference pattern where
  waves cancel or combine.
  [diffractingAfterSlits] Wave passing through one open slit, emerging as a circular wave.
  [whichPathAfterSlits] Wave passing through slits, { $slitSetting ->
    [leftDetector] with detector over top slit
    [rightDetector] with detector over bottom slit
   *[bothDetectors] with detectors over both slits
  }. Non-interfering circular waves emanate from the slits.
  [directToScreen] { $waveProgressCheckpoint ->
    [quarter] Wave crossed one-quarter of wave area
    [half] Wave crossed halfway across wave area
    [threeQuarters] Wave crossed three-quarters of wave area
    [full] Wave crossed full wave area
   *[none] Wave crossed about { $progress } percent of wave area
  } and is traveling directly toward the detector screen.
 *[hittingScreen] Wave has reached the detector screen.
}

displayTools.value:
{ $displayMode ->
  [graph] Graph view is active
 *[screen] Detector screen view is active
}. Wave display mode is { $waveDisplayMode ->
  [electricField] Electric Field
  [timeAveragedIntensity] Amplitude
  [realPart] Real Part
  [imaginaryPart] Imaginary Part
 *[magnitude] Amplitude
}. Screen brightness is { $brightness } percent. Stored snapshots: { $snapshotCount }. Tools shown: { $tapeMeasure ->
  [true] tape measure
 *[false] no tape measure
}, { $stopwatch ->
  [true] stopwatch
 *[false] no stopwatch
}, { $timePlot ->
  [true] time plot
 *[false] no time plot
}, { $positionPlot ->
  [true] position plot.
 *[false] no position plot.
}

sourceStopped.value: Source stopped. The wave area and detector screens clear.

detectionModeChanged.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Average Intensity selected. The predicted pattern is shown continuously.
 *[hits] Hits selected. Individual particle impacts build the pattern statistically.
}

slitConfigurationChanged.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] { $sourceRestartedResponse }
 *[false] { $slitSetting ->
    [bothOpen] Both slits open.
    [leftCovered] Top slit covered.
    [rightCovered] Bottom slit covered.
    [leftDetector] Top slit detector added.
    [rightDetector] Bottom slit detector added.
    [noBarrier] Barrier removed.
   *[bothDetectors] Detectors added to both slits.
  }
}

waveDisplayChanged.value:
Wave display changed to { $waveDisplayMode ->
  [electricField] Electric Field.
  [timeAveragedIntensity] Amplitude.
  [realPart] Real Part.
  [imaginaryPart] Imaginary Part.
 *[magnitude] Amplitude.
}

toolChanged.value:
{ $tool ->
  [tapeMeasure] Tape measure
  [stopwatch] Stopwatch
  [timePlot] Time plot
 *[positionPlot] Position plot
} { $isVisible ->
  [true] shown.
 *[false] hidden.
}

hitStageChanged.value:
Hits pattern is now { $hitStage ->
  [none] empty.
  [few] just beginning with a few scattered hits.
  [emerging] showing faint repeated stripes.
  [developing] developing distinct interference bands.
 *[clear] showing a clear interference pattern.
}

waveProgressChanged.value:
{ $waveProgressStage ->
  [sourceOff] Source is off, so no wave is traveling.
  [travelingToSlits] { $waveProgressCheckpoint ->
    [quarter] Wave approaching slits
    [half] Wave approaching slits
    [threeQuarters] Wave approaching slits
    [full] Wave approaching slits
   *[none] Wave approaching slits
  } { $waveSpeed ->
    [slow] at slow speed.
    [fast] at fast speed.
   *[medium] at medium speed.
  }
  [atSlits] Wave passing through slits, emerging as circular waves.
  [interferingAfterSlits] Circular waves overlap, creating checkered interference pattern where waves cancel or combine.
  [diffractingAfterSlits] Wave passing through one open slit, emerging as a circular wave.
  [whichPathAfterSlits] Wave passing through slits, { $slitSetting ->
    [leftDetector] with detector over top slit
    [rightDetector] with detector over bottom slit
   *[bothDetectors] with detectors over both slits
  }. Non-interfering circular waves emanate from the slits.
  [directToScreen] { $waveProgressCheckpoint ->
    [quarter] Wave crossed one-quarter of wave area and traveling directly toward detector screen.
    [half] Wave crossed halfway across wave area and traveling directly toward detector screen.
    [threeQuarters] Wave crossed three-quarters of wave area and traveling directly toward detector screen.
    [full] Wave crossed the full wave area.
   *[none] Wave crossed about { $progress } percent of wave area and traveling directly toward detector screen.
  }
 *[hittingScreen] Wave reached the detector screen.
}

maxHitsReached.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

reset.value: Experiment reset. Source is off and detector screen is empty.

sourceEmitter.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [photons] Photon Source Emitter
  [electrons] Electron Source Emitter
  [neutrons] Neutron Source Emitter
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium Atom Source Emitter
} is { $isEmitting ->
  [true] on.
 *[false] off.
}

detectionMode.value:
Screen Detection set to { $detectionMode ->

screenDistance.value: Distance from double-slit barrier to detector screen is { $distance }.

accessibleParagraph.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [electrons] Electron mass is 9.1 times 10 to the negative 31 kilograms.
  [neutrons] Neutron mass is 1.7 times 10 to the negative 27 kilograms.
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom particle mass is 6.6 times 10 to the negative 27 kilograms.
}

accessibleName.value:
{ $sourceType ->
  [photons] Photon Source Emitter
  [electrons] Electron Source Emitter
  [neutrons] Neutron Source Emitter
 *[heliumAtoms] Helium Atom Source Emitter
}

accessibleHelpText.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Turn source off to stop experiment.
 *[false] { $sourceType ->
    [photons] Turn source on to start experiment.
    [electrons] Turn source on to start experiment. Electron mass is 9.1
    times 10 to the negative 31 kilograms.
    [neutrons] Turn source on to start experiment. Neutron mass is 1.7
    times 10 to the negative 27 kilograms.

    6.6 times 10 to the negative 27 kilograms.
  }
}

accessibleContextResponseOn.value:
{ $isPlaying ->
  [false] Experiment started. Sim paused.
 *[true] Experiment started. { $detectionMode ->
    [averageIntensity] Alternating bright and dark vertical bands on detector screen.
   *[hits] Individual hits increasing on detector screen.
  }
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Add ruler to measure distances across detector screen or graph. Once added, move ruler up or down with keyboard shortcuts.
Add stopwatch to time experiment. Once added, Start, Pause, Reset Stopwatch, and move with keyboard shortcuts.
Use added time plot to graph wave value at a position over time.
Use added position plot to graph wave value across positions in the wave area.
Change distance between centers of slits in barrier in micrometers.

{ $sourceType ->
  [photons] Move slitted barrier closer to or farther from detector screen in micrometers.
  [electrons] Move slitted barrier closer to or farther from detector screen in nanometers.
  [neutrons] Move slitted barrier closer to or farther from detector screen in nanometers.
 *[heliumAtoms] Move slitted barrier closer to or farther from detector screen in nanometers.
}
Move detector screen closer to or farther from slitted barrier in meters.
Change wavelength of emitted photons in nanometers from shortest, violet, to longest, red.
Change speed of emitted particles in kilometers or meters per second.

Change number of { $sourceType ->
  [photons] photons
  [electrons] electrons
  [neutrons] neutrons
 *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
} emitted per second to adjust source intensity.

{ $change ->

  [less] Less { $sourceType ->
    [photons] photons

   *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
  }.
  [max] Max { $sourceType ->

    [neutrons] neutrons

  }.

    [photons] photons
    [electrons] electrons
    [neutrons] neutrons
   *[heliumAtoms] helium atoms
  }.
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Adjust brightness to optimize visual analysis of pattern on detector screen.
Choose continuous intensity pattern or individual hits pattern for particle detection.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Alternating bright and dark vertical bands on detector screen.
 *[false] Screen is empty. Start particle source.
}

{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] Individual hits increasing on detector screen.
 *[false] Screen is empty. Start particle source.
}

simSpeedDescription.value: Choose Normal or Fast speed. In Hits mode, Fast collects hits more quickly for faster data collection.

accessibleHelpText.value: Change particle type for source emitter and change experiment setup.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $isMaxHitsReached ->
  [true] { $sourceType ->
    [photons] Photon
    [electrons] Electron
    [neutrons] Neutron
   *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
  } experiment at max hits. Clear detector screen to make more observations.
 *[false] { $isEmitting ->
    [true] { $sourceType ->
      [photons] Photon
      [electrons] Electron
      [neutrons] Neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
    } experiment, detector pattern changed.
   *[false] Source off. { $sourceType ->
      [photons] Photon
      [electrons] Electron
      [neutrons] Neutron
     *[heliumAtoms] Helium atom
    } experiment ready to start.
  }
}
Now experimenting with photons. Source, slits, and screen settings updated.
Now experimenting with electrons. Source, slits, and screen settings updated.
Now experimenting with neutrons. Source, slits, and screen settings updated.
Now experimenting with helium atoms. Source, slits, and screen settings updated.

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose slit configuration for barrier.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] In barrier, both slits open.
  [leftCovered] In barrier, left slit covered.
  [rightCovered] In barrier, right slit covered.
  [leftDetector] Detector added to left slit in barrier.
  [rightDetector] Detector added to right slit in barrier.
  [noBarrier] No barrier.
 *[bothDetectors] Detectors added to both slits in barrier.
}

accessibleHelpText.value: Choose graph or screen representation for data analysis.
Choose Amplitude or Electric Field display for photon wave.
Choose real part, imaginary part, or amplitude display for matter wave function.

accessibleParagraph.value:
Magnified view of the barrier with two vertical slits, each { $slitWidth } wide. { $slitSetting ->
  [bothOpen] Both slits are open.
  [leftCovered] Left slit is covered.
  [rightCovered] Right slit is covered.
  [leftDetector] Left slit is monitored by a detector.
  [rightDetector] Right slit is monitored by a detector.
  [noBarrier] No barrier between source and screen.
 *[bothDetectors] Both slits are monitored by detectors.
}

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: Explore a graph of the detector screen pattern.

accessibleContextResponseExpanded.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Dynamic graph of intensity pattern shown.
 *[hits] Dynamic histogram of hits data shown.
}

accessibleContextResponseCollapsed.value:
{ $detectionMode ->
  [averageIntensity] Intensity graph hidden.
 *[hits] Hits histogram hidden.
}

intensityOff.value: The graph is empty. The source is off.

intensity.value: The graph traces intensity versus position with a tall central peak and smaller peaks on either side. { $spatialDescription }

intensitySingleSlit.value: The graph traces intensity versus position as a single broad peak centered on the graph, tapering smoothly toward the edges.

hitsNone.value: The histogram is empty. No particles have been counted yet.

hitsFew.value: A few bars have appeared at scattered positions across the histogram.

hitsEmerging.value: The histogram is growing. Some bars are becoming taller than others at repeated positions across the graph.

hitsDeveloping.value: Taller bars are appearing at regular intervals, with shorter bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsClear.value: The histogram shows a tall central peak with repeating side peaks and lower bars between them. { $spatialDescription }

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: The histogram is growing, with taller bars near the center and shorter bars toward the edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: The histogram shows a broad central peak that tapers toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

zoomInAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom in to see more detail of graph pattern.

zoomOutAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom out to see more of graph pattern.

accessibleContextResponse.value: Maximum number of hits reached. Source is off. Clear detector screen to make more observations.

intensity.value: Detector screen shows { $bandCount } alternating bright and dark vertical bands, brightest at center and fainter toward edges. { $spatialDescription }

intensitySingleSlit.value: Detector screen is brightest at the center and fades smoothly toward the edges in a broad band. { $spatialDescription }

hitsNone.value: Detector screen is empty. No particles have arrived yet.

hitsFew.value: A handful of particles are visible at scattered positions across the screen.

hitsEmerging.value: More particles are appearing, and faint vertical stripes are becoming visible with gaps between them.

hitsDeveloping.value: Individual impacts are gathering into distinct vertical bands, separated by regions with fewer particles. { $spatialDescription }

hitsClear.value: Distinct vertical bands fill the screen, with dense stripes separated by nearly empty gaps. { $spatialDescription }

hitsSingleSlitEmerging.value: More particles are appearing in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges.

hitsSingleSlitClear.value: Hits form a broad central band that tapers toward the edges. { $spatialDescription }

snapshotHitsNone.value:
Detector screen is empty. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
} No particles have arrived yet.

snapshotHitsFew.value:
A handful of particles are visible at scattered positions across the screen. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing, and faint vertical stripes are becoming visible with gaps between them. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

snapshotHitsSingleSlitEmerging.value:
More particles are appearing in a broad region near the center of the screen, with fewer toward the edges. { $hitCount ->
    [one] Detector screen shows a total of 1 hit.
   *[other] Detector screen shows a total of { $hitCount } hits.
}

rulerDoubleSlit.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] { $count } bands centered at 0 millimeters, spaced roughly { $spacing } millimeters apart.
  *[peaks] { $count } peaks centered at 0 millimeters, spaced roughly { $spacing } millimeters apart.
}

noRulerDoubleSlit.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] { $count } bands centered on the screen, spread symmetrically to either side.
  *[peaks] { $count } peaks centered on the graph, spread symmetrically to either side.
}

rulerDoubleSlitArrangement.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] Bands centered at 0 millimeters, spaced roughly { $spacing } millimeters apart.
  *[peaks] Peaks centered at 0 millimeters, spaced roughly { $spacing } millimeters apart.
}

noRulerDoubleSlitArrangement.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] Bands are centered on screen and spread symmetrically to either side.
  *[peaks] Peaks are centered on graph and spread symmetrically to either side.
}

rulerSingleSlit.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] The central band spans roughly { $centralWidth } millimeters, centered at 0.
  *[peaks] The central peak spans roughly { $centralWidth } millimeters, centered at 0.
}

noRulerSingleSlit.value:
{ $style ->
  [bands] A broad central band centered on the screen, tapering toward the edges.
  *[peaks] A broad central peak, tapering toward the edges.
}

zoomInAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom in to see more detail of detector screen pattern.

zoomOutAccessibleHelpText.value: Zoom out to see more of detector screen pattern.

accessibleHelpText.value: Clear hits pattern on detector screen.

accessibleContextResponse.value:
{ $isEmitting ->
  [true] { $isPlaying ->
    [true] Hits pattern cleared. Hits detection restarted. Individual hits increasing
    on detector screen.
   *[false] Hits pattern cleared. Sim paused.
  }
 *[false] Hits pattern cleared. Screen empty.
}

accessibleHelpText.value:
{ $snapshotCount ->
  [0] Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
  [1] One snapshot stored. Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
  [2] Two snapshots stored. Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
  [3] Three snapshots stored. Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
  [4] Four snapshots stored. Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
 *[other] { $snapshotCount } snapshots stored. Capture and store up to { $maxSnapshots } snapshots of detector screen pattern.
}
Open stored snapshots for comparative analysis or deletion.
